articles.headline: Steadfast Capital Liquidates Pool Corporation Position With $156 Million Exit
articles.summary: This distributor supplies pool and outdoor living products to professional customers across North America, Europe, and Australia.

articles.headline: Klaviyo Google AI Pact Puts Undervalued Shares In Enterprise Focus
articles.summary: Klaviyo (NYSE:KVYO) announced a partnership with Google to build autonomous AI driven customer experiences. The collaboration connects Google's messaging, search, and AI tools with Klaviyo's real time customer data platform. The companies plan to support features such as conversational AI agents and richer mobile messaging for enterprise clients. Klaviyo runs a real time customer data and marketing automation platform that brands use to manage email, SMS, and other direct channels. As AI...

articles.headline: OpenAI tops $25 billion in annualized revenue, The Information reports
articles.summary: Artificial intelligence startup OpenAI topped $25 billion in annualized revenue as of the ‌end of last month, The Information reported ‌on Wednesday, citing a person familiar with the figure.  This is a ​17% increase from the $21.4 billion in annualized revenue that the company generated at the end of the year, the report said.  In the enterprise race, OpenAI faces competition from rivals such as Anthropic and giants like Google that are selling AI capabilities to enterprises.

articles.headline: Big Tech Joins White House Energy Pledge as Iran Tensions Threaten Higher Costs
articles.summary: Amazon, Google, Meta, Microsoft, OpenAI, Oracle, and xAI agreed to fund electricity supply and grid upgrades as AI energy demands spike.

articles.headline: Broadcom’s AI Surge Tests Valuation As Custom Chips And Telco Push Expand
articles.summary: Broadcom (NasdaqGS:AVGO) reported record fiscal first quarter results, supported by a 106% year over year increase in AI semiconductor revenue. The company highlighted strong demand for custom AI accelerators and AI networking products across its customer base. Management outlined an ambitious AI roadmap and targets AI chip sales of more than US$100b next year. Broadcom announced multi year partnerships with Google, Meta, Anthropic and OpenAI around custom AI hardware. The company launched...

articles.headline: Gemini Lawsuit And Apple Deal Reframe Alphabet’s AI Risk And Reward
articles.summary: Alphabet (NasdaqGS:GOOGL) is facing a landmark wrongful death lawsuit alleging its Gemini chatbot contributed to an individual's suicide. The case is described as the first of its kind involving a major consumer AI product and raises new legal and ethical questions for AI developers. Separately, Apple and Alphabet have agreed a multi year collaboration that will see Google's Gemini models and cloud services support Siri. The partnership positions Google's AI and cloud stack at the core of a...

articles.headline: Google to open German centre for 'AI development'
articles.summary: Google will open an AI centre in Berlin on Thursday, the latest sign of Europe's deepening reliance on US firms in cutting edge technologies despite the continent's stated aim to catch up with its rivals.The firm said at the time it would renovate its Berlin office to add three floors equipped with meeting rooms, a new conference room and a demo space but made no mention of an AI centre in the capital.

articles.headline: Bank of America Securities Maintains $370 Price Target on Alphabet (GOOGL)
articles.summary: Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOGL) is one of the best WallStreetBets stocks to buy according to analysts. On March 2, Bank of America Securities analyst Justin Post reiterated his Buy rating for Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOGL) and a price target of $370. The stock took a breather in February after a stellar run in 2025. Alphabet has a […]

articles.headline: Broadcom CEO Sees AI Chip Sales Topping $100 Billion in 2027
articles.summary: The company projects that AI chip revenue will be $10.7 billion in the current quarter, so reaching an annual pace of $100 billion would be a major jump.  Broadcom reported $20 billion in AI sales in 2025.
